visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) This is a live-action video with graphic-style text overlays. A woman with dark hair tied in a bun, wearing a green and white horizontal striped oversized long-sleeved shirt, stands in a brightly lit indoor nursery. The room has white closets and wooden shelves filled with light blue storage bins. Colorful toys, including a blue plush animal and a Spider-Man doll, are scattered across the light-colored wooden floor. A large red graphic with black text appears above her as she looks at the mess with an annoyed facial expression. (2) The camera follows the woman as she accidentally trips over a blue plush toy, her body lurching forward towards a wooden desk area. She grimaces and reaches her hand to her head. She then walks through a white hallway, picking up a small teal toy from the floor. She proceeds to crouch under a white table to retrieve another item, bumping her head against the underside and showing physical distress through squinted eyes and a hand clutching her forehead. (3) The scene shifts to a brightly lit bathroom with beige tiles and a large mirror. The woman stands before a white sink, wearing the same striped shirt. She looks intensely at her reflection, lifting a section of hair at her crown with her hand to reveal several grey hair strands at the roots. Her mouth is slightly open in a look of concern and realization as she examines the silver hairs. (4) In the bathroom, the woman holds a red and white box of CIELO hair dye. She has put on clear plastic gloves and a grey towel draped over her shoulders. She uses her thumb to press the white nozzle of a red and white pressurized bottle, dispensing two ribbons of cream—one yellow and one white—directly onto the bristles of a red plastic hairbrush. (5) The woman applies the cream-covered brush to her hair roots at the forehead and temples. She uses her gloved hands to massage the product into her dark hair, ensuring full coverage from the scalp outward. Several shots show her rubbing the thick white cream through different sections of her hair. She maintains a focused and eventually satisfied expression throughout the process. (6) The setting changes to a clean, well-lit room with a white table. The woman now wears a beige cropped sweatshirt and matching pants. Her hair is dark, shiny, and neatly styled, with no visible grey roots. She stands behind several boxes of the hair dye product, gesturing towards her hair and the packaging with an enthusiastic smile and energetic hand movements. (7) A close-up shot focuses on the woman's scalp and hair roots as she parts her hair with her fingers. The roots are uniformly dark, showing the successful application of the dye without any patches of grey. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the texture and refreshed color of the hair. (8) The woman stands in front of the camera, holding two boxes of the hair dye and the red bottle. She raises her fist in an encouraging gesture while smiling broadly at the viewer. The background is a simple, modern interior. Overlays with lists of different hair color shades and text continue to appear as she gestures toward them.

(24) [Subtitle]: 在家就可以輕鬆享受 媲美髮廊般的變髮樂趣. [Slogan]: 在家輕鬆享受 媲美髮廊般的變髮樂趣 輕盈透明感5色 1N蜜茶裸棕 2LA米灰棕 3MA薄荷灰棕 3PA松果灰棕 3AG煙燻灰棕. (25) [Subtitle]: 平常要上班啊 又要照顧小朋友. (26) [Subtitle]: 你要戰勝白髮這種小確幸的話呢 就交給宣若 方便又省時間. (27) [Subtitle]: 有興趣的 優惠連結點起來!. [Slogan]: 優惠連結點起來!.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female character appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with dark hair usually tied in a bun. She initially wears a green and white striped oversized long-sleeved shirt and blue shorts, later changing into a beige cropped sweatshirt and matching beige pants.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern home environment including a playroom with white wardrobes and wooden toy shelves, a white hallway, and a bathroom with beige wall tiles and a porcelain sink.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a loud, frustrated female vocal sigh followed by a high-pitched, annoyed exclamation in Taiwanese Mandarin. The vocal delivery has a sharp pitch contour and high arousal. There is no background music, only the clean, high-fidelity recording of the voice. (2) A loud, percussive thud sound effect with a broad spectral bandwidth occurs, indicating a physical impact or trip. The woman follows this with a low-volume, strained groan. The acoustic texture is dominated by the sudden transient of the impact followed by the vocal reaction. (3) Rhythmic, high-frequency 'ding' and 'slide' sound effects are heard as objects are moved. These are clearly stylized post-production SFX used to punctuate actions. The sound of soft footsteps on a hard floor provides a low-level ambient texture. (4) Another sudden, dull thud sound effect triggers, followed by a sharper 'clack' as if a head has hit a wooden surface. The woman groans again, her voice displaying a mix of pain and frustration with a falling intonation. (5) A sharp, high-pitched 'ding' sound effect, common in variety shows to indicate a realization, occurs. The woman's breathing is slightly audible, indicating a close-mic field recording quality with high tonal purity. (6) An upbeat, mid-tempo acoustic-pop background music (BGM) enters abruptly. The BGM features a bright, major-mode tonality with a clear acoustic guitar rhythm and a steady percussion beat at approximately 120 BPM. A female vocalist in the BGM sings in a light style. (7) A distinct mechanical clicking sound occurs twice in rapid succession as a pressurized nozzle is depressed. The sound is crisp with a narrow frequency range. The narrator continues her clear, enunciated delivery over the ongoing BGM. (8) The sound of a brush moving through hair creates a soft, friction-based rustling noise. This is layered under the narrator's enthusiastic speech and the rhythmic BGM. The audio mix maintains a high signal-to-noise ratio. (9) The BGM swells slightly in volume during a transition. The narrator's voice reaches a high valence and arousal, concluding the video with an energetic call to action. The final second features a quick fade-out of the music and a final vocal peak.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video uses a comedic hook of a mother struggling with a messy home and discovering grey hair to transition into an informative showcase for CIELO EX Hair Color Cream. It aims to demonstrate how easy and effective the product is for busy individuals to use at home, concluding with a celebratory reveal of the results and a direct call to action to click a discount link.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire second half of the video is dedicated to demonstrating and praising the CIELO hair dye product, including showing the packaging and specific features.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively utilizes social-media-style editing with variety-show sound effects and text overlays to maintain high engagement while delivering promotional content.
